falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong trend breakout would invalidate the consolidation pattern implied by the HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume exceeds 200% of the 30-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Abnormal volume would indicate a forced liquidation or breakout, contradicting the pattern's implied stability

falsification_conditions.condition: A confirmed bullish engulfing pattern forms on the daily chart with a 10% price increase
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This technical reversal pattern would directly contradict the pattern match to a bottoming scenario

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
